blocks.text: Hovland slipped to T20 on Sunday's final round at TPC Sawgrass — played himself out of contention late. Cameron Young claims THE PLAYERS at -13.

blocks.label: ⚽ Three more CL deciders Tuesday night
items: ⚽ 21:00 — Arsenal vs Bayer Leverkusen — Emirates decider, all-square on aggregate
⚽ 21:00 — Real Madrid vs Manchester City — Haaland's City face the kings of Europe
⚽ 21:00 — Chelsea vs PSG — Stamford Bridge showdown, nothing between them
